examples: We visited Nimes and Arles, i. e. two ancient cities.
So Strauss used a softer cotton cloth from France called serge DE Nimes, which became known as denim.
Nimes, france, is the source of denim. in french it was called serge de nimes, or " fabric from nimes, " and de nimes became " denim.
Fights - known as corridas in Spain - are especially popular in the Nimes and Arles areas.
